title: Nuanced disagreement
subtitle: Disagree with precision and respect.
overview: B2 disagreement identifies exactly what is weak.
Do not reject the whole idea if only one part is problematic.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: No cuestiono el objetivo, sino el enfoque.
I do not question the goal, but the approach.
El punto débil del argumento es...
The weak point of the argument is...
It seems debatable to me that...
It is not enough to state that...

items.es: No cuestiono el objetivo, sino el enfoque que se propone.
items.en: I do not question the goal, but the approach being proposed.

items.es: El punto débil del argumento es que no considera a las personas con menos recursos.
items.en: The weak point of the argument is that it does not consider people with fewer resources.

items.es: Me parece discutible que la solución sea tan sencilla como parece.
items.en: It seems debatable to me that the solution is as simple as it seems.

items.es: No basta con afirmar que todos deben adaptarse.
items.en: It is not enough to state that everyone must adapt.

items.es: Por eso propondría una alternativa más gradual.
items.en: That is why I would propose a more gradual alternative.
